title: Industry-Leading Call Tracking & Analytics Platform — How It Integrates with monday.com 📞

posts.author: WirkKarl (Karl)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone

I wanted to share some insights and start a discussion about call tracking and analytics — especially for teams using monday.com to manage leads and client interactions.

A lot of businesses still struggle to understand which marketing channels actually drive inbound calls. By integrating an industry-leading call tracking platform with monday.com, you can:

Track every inbound call and automatically assign it to the right lead or project
See which ads or keywords generate the best ROI
Record and analyze conversations to improve sales scripts
Visualize call performance in monday.com dashboards

Curious to know — has anyone here integrated call tracking or Pay-Per-Call systems with monday.com?
What tools or automations have you used to link incoming calls with your CRM workflows?

Let’s share what’s working — could be a game-changer for marketing and sales alignment!
